name: Snappy Tom Cat With Chicken 85g
shortDescription: Snappy Tom CAT With Chicken 85g is a nutritionally balanced wet cat food made from chicken and vegetables, designed to maintain your cat’s health while providing energy for alertness and agility throughout the day
description: . Product Features • Main Ingredient – Made primarily with chicken, delivering high-quality protein and fat essential for your cat’s health, strength, and energy. • Complemented with Vegetables – Includes wholesome vegetables in a rich gourmet gravy, offering both taste and nutrition cats love. • Convenient Packaging – Available in 85g cans or pouches, perfect for single servings or portion control based on your cat’s needs. Nutritional Benefits • Supports Active Lifestyles – Protein and fat content help keep your cat alert, agile, and healthy all day. • Enhanced Palatability – Slow-cooked preparation locks in flavor and preserves key nutrients for maximum benefit. Feeding Guidelines Adjust feeding amounts according to your cat’s weight and activity level: Cat Weight Daily Feeding Amount 0.5 – 1.0 kg 60g – 90g 1.0 – 3.0 kg 90g – 210g 3.0 – 4.0 kg 210g – 260g 4.0 kg + 260g +
